childhood.familyBackground: A prominent figure in the manufacturing industry, Koon Poh Keong has built a fortune of $6.8 billion through self-made success in aluminum production. He ranks #645 on Forbes' 2026 Billionaires list.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 제조업의 저명한 인물인 쿤 포 케옹은 알루미늄 생산을 통해 68억 달러의 자산을 축적했습니다. 그는 포브스 2026 억만장자 리스트에서 645위에 올랐습니다.
childhood.education: Details of Koon Poh Keong's education are not widely documented in public sources.
childhood.educationKo: Koon Poh Keong의 교육 세부사항은 공개 자료에서 널리 기록되지 않음.
childhood.earlyLife: Koon Poh Keong built a career in Aluminum.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: Koon Poh Keong은(는) Aluminum 분야에서 경력을 쌓음.

careerTimeline.event: Became a major figure in Aluminum

failures.description: COVID-19 pandemic impacted business operations globally
failures.descriptionKo: 코로나19 팬데믹이 전 세계적으로 사업 운영에 영향
failures.lesson: Resilience and adaptability are essential in times of crisis

personalTraits.knownFor: Building wealth through Aluminum. Net worth $6.8B.
